subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! During the arrival and departure of the travellers, and in the days of their sojourn in that city, thou didst render services [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان حین ورود و خروج مسافرین و ایام مکث ایشان در آنشهر خدماتی
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
